description: Composition Brown printed blouson top made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves with elasticated cuffs, and is slightly gathered round neckline with a buttoned chest placket Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This blouson top from w is meant for those who take their casuals seriously. Look stylish in this printed top and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with capris and flats for a casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtis Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
